card.name: Elise
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Elise attacks, create a tapped and attacking Spiderling token. At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control three or more other spider creatures, transform Elise. Partner --- (Back): Spider Queen Elise

card.name: Spider Queen Elise
card.text: Fearsome, Challenger (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) Other spiders your control have Fearsome and Challenger. --- (Front): Elise

card.name: Draven
card.text: First strike When Draven enters, or whenever Draven deals combat damage, create a Spinning Axe token. At the end of combat, if Draven attacked and was not destroyed while equipped with a Spinning Axe, put a Glory counter on Draven. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Draven has two or more Glory counters, remove all Glory counters from Draven, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Draven, The Glorious Executioner

card.name: Draven, The Glorious Executioner
card.text: First strike, Trample When Draven transforms, or whenever Draven deals combat damage, create a Spinning Axe token. --- (Front): Draven
